# Objective

Run regression analyses and save the results.

# Prepare

```{r}
#| label: setup

#--- packages ---#
library(fixest)
```

# Regression analysis

First, load the analysis-ready data.

```{r}
#| label: prep-reg-data

#--- load the data for regression ---#
reg_data <- readRDS(here::here("data/processed/reg_data.rds"))
```

Run regression analysis with three different models.

```{r}
#| label: reg-analysis

#--- regression analysis ---#
reg_results_1 <- feols(dep_delay ~ temp + precip + wind_speed, data = reg_data)

reg_results_2 <- feols(dep_delay ~ temp + precip + wind_speed | month + origin, data = reg_data)

reg_results_3 <- feols(dep_delay ~ temp + precip + wind_speed | month + origin, cluster = ~ origin, data = reg_data)
```

Combine the results and save.

```{r}
#| label: save-reg-results

#--- combine ---#
reg_list <- list(reg_results_1, reg_results_2, reg_results_3)

#--- save ---#
saveRDS(reg_list, here::here("results/reg_results.rds"))
```
